title: Publish assertions to a nanopublication network/feed
context: Publishing assertions as nanopublications improves downstream interoperability with the open linked-data ecosystem. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Publish the graph's assertions to a nanopublication network/feed for downstream interoperability.
acceptanceCriteria: Assertions are serialized as valid nanopublications with provenance + publication info.
Nanopublications are published to a network/feed and are resolvable.
output: Nanopublication publishing tooling + a published feed reference, committed via PR.
